title: Kernel lane: verification. Bootstrap only. Do not inspect the repository, docs, README, AGENTS, CODEX, or CI. Prepare a verification stance for a future task once focus arrives. Remain available for follow-up.
summary_text: Verification lane initialized in bootstrap mode. Stance for incoming focus: - Primary gate: `security`, `correctness`, `regression risk`, `missing/weak tests`. - Output format on arrival: findings first by severity, then open assumptions, then minimal remediation plan. - Evidence requirement: reproducible checks, explicit expected vs actual behavior, and test impact. - Policy guard: if decision-making falls back to this single lane only, I will flag it as a workflow violation. Ready for follow-up with the target scope.
